intended_use: Allow CTU-pretrained GRU review only for low-volume repeated behavior where XGBoost low-slow v2 is weak.

conditions.reason: 12-window traffic volume is low enough to match low-and-slow behavior.
12-window failure ratio is below scan-burst behavior.
60-window failure ratio remains below noisy scan behavior.

notes: The gate does not use scenario_id, attack_type, label, src_ip, or dst_ip.
Thresholds were derived from validation analysis of CTU-pretrained GRU review rows and must be recalibrated with more real captures.
The gate is designed to preserve low-and-slow review signals while suppressing scan-burst false review signals.
